Variables.Name: bSpawnModule
Variables.Description: If true, the module performs operations on particles during Spawning

Variables.Name: bUpdateModule
Variables.Description: If true, the module performs operations on particles during Updating

Variables.Name: bFinalUpdateModule
Variables.Description: If true, the module performs operations on particles during final update

Variables.Name: bUpdateForGPUEmitter
Variables.Description: If true, the module performs operations on particles during update andor final update for GPU emitters

Variables.Name: bCurvesAsColor
Variables.Description: If true, the module displays FVector curves as colors

Variables.Name: b3DDrawMode
Variables.Description: If true, the module should render its 3D visualization helper

Variables.Name: bSupported3DDrawMode
Variables.Description: If true, the module supports rendering a 3D visualization helper

Variables.Name: bEnabled
Variables.Description: If true, the module is enabled

Variables.Name: bEditable
Variables.Description: If true, the module has had editing enabled on it

Variables.Name: LODDuplicate
Variables.Description:
If true, this flag indicates that auto-generation for LOD will result in
		an exact duplicate of the module, regardless of the percentage.
		If false, it will result in a module with different settings.

Variables.Name: bSupportsRandomSeed
Variables.Description: If true, the module supports RandomSeed setting

Variables.Name: bRequiresLoopingNotification
Variables.Description: If true, the module should be told when looping

Variables.Name: LODValidity
Variables.Description:
The LOD levels this module is present in.
	 	Bit-flags are used to indicate validity for a given LOD level.
	 	For example, if
	 		((1 << Level) & LODValidity) != 0
	 	then the module is used in that LOD.
